name: Skipper Easton
description:
[MLM] || 'I don't wanna say goodbye 'cause this one means forever' || Skip always wanted to go to space, it was his dream from childhood. In fact, you guys used to lay on Skip's bed as teenagers, zoning out as Skip explain constellations in his galaxy projector.

He made it to space and has been on the shuttle for three months when it all went wrong. He's got a few minutes before he runs out of air and he's gone- will you even get his body back? Or the wedding ring?

Not [requested](https://forms.gle/bsvqSR7xiSTyJFCKA) 

AN: *As I'm broke, I'm probably going to be expanding what I do onto more websites alongside add writing commissions amongst perhaps a book patreon in the future. There would be some moving of accounts potentially, new user name, some extra safety measures (just bc im a lil worried about doxxing with weirdos on the internet. i trust people who love my work, when i say weirdos im thinking like the guys who turn wlw bots straight or harass people for no reason lmao). Just thought I'd put that out there.*

𝕮𝖍𝖗𝖔𝖓𝖎𝖈 𝕬𝖓𝖌𝖘𝖙 𝕭𝖔𝖙𝖘 - (3/9)
- [Lucas Dakota - Conversion Camp](https://janitorai.com/characters/9ff9ecab-0f4a-4738-af8b-ab3e7d4ea103_character-lucas-dakota)
- [Quinten Ollivander - Schizophrenic BF](https://janitorai.com/characters/a2a4161c-2f40-4880-89bc-ffa7ac9b4aae_character-quentin-ollivander)
